title: fix(gen-text): strip reasoning_effort for non-reasoning grok via transform
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Strips `reasoning_effort` only for `grok` / `grok-4-20-non-reasoning`; prod repro showed 500 with the param and 200 without it.
- Preserves `reasoning_effort` for reasoning Grok variants (`grok-large`, `grok-4.3`).
- Composes with `stripCacheControl` from #11512 so the newer Grok Azure fix is not regressed.
- Adds transform and model-wiring tests for the stripped and preserved paths.

Verification:
- `npm run test -- --run test/text/transforms/stripReasoningEffort.test.ts test/text/transforms/stripCacheControl.test.ts`
- `npx tsc --noEmit --project gen.pollinations.ai/tsconfig.json`

Addresses #11167
Addresses #11089

gist.headline: No overthinking allowed
gist.blurb: Fixed a bug where asking standard Grok models to think too hard caused them to crash. Non-reasoning Grok models will now politely ignore the reasoning_effort parameter instead of throwing an error.
gist.summary: Strips the `reasoning_effort` parameter from requests to non-reasoning Grok models (`grok`, `grok-4-20-non-reasoning`) to prevent 500 errors, while preserving it for reasoning variants like `grok-large`.
gist.impact: Developers can now safely pass `reasoning_effort` in their API calls without breaking standard Grok models, as the parameter is automatically filtered out when unsupported.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating a complex 'reasoning' gear or parameter block before it reaches a retro computer terminal, keeping the terminal happy. Polly the bee watches amused.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a glowing 'reasoning' gear before it reaches a retro computer terminal. The bee mascot hovers nearby wearing tiny wizard glasses, watching amused. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
